personal.name: Dingu Sagar
personal.title: AI Software Engineer
personal.bio: AI Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience building deep learning solutions including Multi-Modal LLMs and distributed systems. Product- and customer-centric mindset with strong ownership.

summary: AI Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience designing, building, fine-tuning, optimizing, and deploying deep learning solutions including Multi-Modal LLMs and distributed systems for SaaS. Demonstrates a product- and customer-centric mindset with strong ownership and rapid learning skills leveraging modern AI tools.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: Designed, built, and deployed an end-to-end ML-powered anomaly detection data processing pipeline for inventory cost data.
highlights: Processed ~20 million daily records in a distributed Spark cluster with ~$12M impact in one quarter
Used PySpark, RCF model, AWS CloudFormation, Glue, Step Functions, Lambda

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Built and integrated the platform's first set of DL features for automated medical coding.
highlights: Improved automated medical coding business metrics (D2B) by 16%, showcased in investor demos
Migrated legacy rule-based NLP services to LLM-based text extractors, improving coding accuracy from 70% to 94%
Utilized LLMs: Llama-3, GPT-4, MedLM, RAG, Medical Knowledge Graphs

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Distributed training, debugging, evaluation and deployment of 3D CNN models for action recognition in videos.
highlights: Delivered 93–97% precision & recall across customer use cases using I3D and BMN models
Conducted research experiments with GLIP model using PyTorch, improving training efficiency with minimal train set

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Led a team of 4 to build an e-commerce product recommendation system and AI chatbot assistants.
highlights: Designed novel search retrieval & ranking using BERT embeddings, VectorDB, CLIP — scaled to 1M+ product listings with 93% recall
Optimized inference latency by 40% using ONNX, quantization, knowledge distillation, AWS Neuron
Built AI chatbot assistants for Shopify clients resolving 60–70% of customer queries; built MLOps pipeline with Kubeflow & TF Serving

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: Built backend APIs for HR Management Software.
highlights: Designed and built a microservice for pinning items across HR use cases
Optimized caching layer using hibernate interceptors to resolve stale data issues
